name: USB and Removable Media
description: Detects USB device connections, removable media access, device installation, and file access on removable storage. Event 6416 records first device insertion with full hardware IDs. DriverFrameworks events track connect/disconnect timing. Critical for data exfiltration investigations.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.6416: New external device recognized by system — DeviceId (VID/PID), ClassName (DiskDrive/USB), ClassId, HardwareIds, CompatibleIds. First-insertion record.
event_descriptions.6423: Device installation blocked by policy — DeviceId
event_descriptions.6424: Device installation allowed after previously being blocked
event_descriptions.20001: DriverFrameworks: USB device connected — DeviceInstanceId, Location
event_descriptions.20003: DriverFrameworks: USB device disconnected — DeviceInstanceId, elapsed time
event_descriptions.400: PnP: Device attached (System log, source Disk)
